programme.title: Cavedweller
programme.desc: A traumatic event sends a musician back to her hometown in an effort to reunite with the daughters she abandoned.

programme.title: Love's Long Journey
programme.desc: Missie's (Erin Cottrell) surprise discovery - her pregnancy - sets her on a new course that's at once thrilling and terrifying. After all the planning and dreaming, she and her husband, Willie (Logan Bartholomew), have headed west in a covered wagon, leaving behind the prairie home of Missie's parents. Later on they meet Jeff Huff and his older brother Sonny. They later make new friends and spend Christmas together.

programme.title: Hans Christian Andersen: My Life as a Fairy Tale
programme.desc: First of a two-part fictionalised account of the early life of Hans Christian Andersen, a young man with a penchant for storytelling but who struggles to find his place in the world and gain the affection of the woman he adores. Interspersed throughout are brief interludes of the stories that made him famous.

programme.title: Hans Christian Andersen: My Life as a Fairy Tale
programme.desc: A fictionalised account of the early life of Hans Christian Andersen, a young man with a penchant for storytelling but who struggles to find his place in the world and gain the affection of the woman he adores. Interspersed throughout are brief interludes of the stories that made him famous.

programme.title: Alice
programme.desc: Alice Tate is an upper-class New York housewife, who spends her days shopping, getting beauty treatments, and gossiping with her friends. She has been married to wealthy Doug for fifteen years, and they have two children, who are being raised by a nanny.

programme.title: Alice
programme.desc: Alice Tate is an upper-class New York housewife, who spends her days shopping, getting beauty treatments, and gossiping with her friends. She has been married to wealthy Doug for fifteen years, and they have two children, who are being raised by a nanny.

programme.title: The Ten Commandments
programme.desc: One of the most famous stories from The Bible, this mini-series sees the Hebrew infant, Moses, being raised in the Egyptian royal household. When his true identity is revealed, he sets out to reclaim his heritage. Later, the plagues descend on Egypt, and Pharaoh frees the Hebrews only to change his mind and pursue them to the Red Sea where the parting of the waves ensures their escape. After receiving the Ten Commandments, Moses faces an orgy of excess amongst his tribe.

programme.title: The Ten Commandments
programme.desc: One of the most famous stories from The Bible, this mini-series sees the Hebrew infant, Moses, being raised in the Egyptian royal household. When his true identity is revealed, he sets out to reclaim his heritage. Later, the plagues descend on Egypt, and Pharaoh frees the Hebrews only to change his mind and pursue them to the Red Sea where the parting of the waves ensures their escape. After receiving the Ten Commandments, Moses faces an orgy of excess amongst his tribe.

programme.title: Jane Doe: The Wrong Face
programme.desc: Mystery thriller about Cathy Davis (Lea Thompson, 'Back to the Future'), a housewife and mother who leads a double life as a government agent. Despite having retired from undercover work, Cathy is called back into service when the wife of a prominent lawyer is kidnapped. She soon finds herself facing one of the most baffling puzzles of her career.

programme.title: Sea Beast / Troglodyte
programme.desc: Mythic creatures emerge from the sea to feast on the residents of a fishing village.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: In Los Angeles, a city where people come to escape, shield secrets, and bury their pasts, we follow this mysterious outbreak as it threatens to disrupt what little stability high school guidance counselor Madison Clark and English teacher Travis Manawa have managed to assemble. The pressure of blending two families while dealing with resentful, escapist, and strung out children takes a back seat when society begins to break down. A forced evolution, and survival of the fittest takes hold, as our dysfunctional family finds they must either reinvent themselves or embrace their darker histories.

programme.title: Blood Money
programme.desc: The story is about Kunal (Kunal Khemu) who believes he can do anything by trying his hardest. He receives a job offer through his friend Shawn (Teeshay) and his wife Nandini (Puja Gupta (actress)) in Cape Town and moves there with his wife Aarzoo (Amrita Puri). They live a happy life together, until Kunal becomes extremely workaholic. Kunal's nature irritates Aarzoo which leads to frequent outbursts and quarrels. Kunal becomes the most trusted employee of his boss Dharmesh Zaveri (Manish Chaudhary). This thing angers Dinesh Zaveri, Dharmesh Zaveri's younger brother. Kunal advances in his job. Soon Dharmesh is revealed to be an underworld gangster. The company Kunal works in deals with exporting diamonds; Kunal has no idea that it happens illegally. His boss, Mr. Zakaria, sends his hot colleague Rosa to charm Kunal and take him away from his wife. Following the day when Kunal gets drunk in a party, Rosa takes advantage and manages to make love with him. Kunal reaches his house and finds Aarzoo sleeping and accidentally wakes her up, after which they both pick up a quarrel. Soon enough, Kunal realises the crime he is a part of and decides to and leave Cape Town. However, Zakaria knows that Kunal is aware of the illegal business and the only way to keep him silent is to kill him.

programme.title: Family Gathering Aka You Lucky Dog
programme.desc: Sentimental romantic comedy starring Natasha Henstridge and Harry Hamlin. After her mother's death, a New York City fashion designer returns to her hometown and the family sheep farm.

programme.title: Stealing Sinatra
programme.desc: In need of a grubstake, a young man convinces a couple of friends to help him kidnap Frank Sinatra Jr.

programme.title: The Circuit
programme.desc: Al Shines, former king of the US race car track circuit, has a hard time starting his own team, once he's fired by his sponsor Robin Cates. Robin hired Al's immature daughter Kylie Shines instead. She resents Al's inevitable 'absence' as a widowed father, as well as the reigning champion, equally young but professionally vetted Kid Walker. Kylie tries to prove herself against Kid while having an on-off affair with him. Cates's marketing strategy dictates his intentions to manipulate Walker and both Shines racers.

programme.title: Close Up
programme.desc: Exploring the lives and careers of the well-known and famous from the worlds of music and film, these 26-minute long biographical portraits provide a pictorial insight into the background, careers and personal lives of some of the twentieth-century's best known personalities and iconic faces.

programme.title: Close Up
programme.desc: Exploring the lives and careers of the well-known and famous from the worlds of music and film, these 26-minute long biographical portraits provide a pictorial insight into the background, careers and personal lives of some of the twentieth-century's best known personalities and iconic faces.

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Reality series, set in Texas and similar to ''North Woods Law'', that follows daily lives of men and women who are Game Wardens and whose job is to protect deserts, lakes, woods, bayous, coasts and wild animals that live in the second-largest state in the U.S. These people have their plates full as they must deal with poachers, hunters who don't obey the law, smugglers, while they rescue injured wildlife and defend citizens.

programme.title: Bad Dog
programme.desc: BAD DOG! is a hilarious hour of television documenting just how far pets can push their owners and still get unconditional love. The series highlights dogs that double as destroyers, hissing cats, cussing parrots, and the most fascinating four-legged escape artists ever caught on tape. Viewers will be treated to candid animal antics you truly have to see to believe. They are some of the baddest pets on the planet and you'll meet their owners who love them just the way they are. We span the globe to crown the Baddest of the Bad on BAD DOG!.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive
programme.desc: Extinct or Alive is an Animal Planet documentary show exploring the possible existence of animals thought to be extinct. Biologist and explorer Forrest Galante follows real life stories and visits wildlife locations across the planet, hoping to discover proof that animals such as the Zanzibar leopard or the Galapagos tortoise still exist. Find out if his methods will bring new exciting discoveries. Could animals we think are extinct for a century still be found in nature?

programme.title: Rugged Justice
programme.desc: Animal Planet's Rugged Justice follows the officers from Washington State's Department of Fish and Wildlife Law Enforcement as they guard the vast borders. It is an elite unit that protect people and wildlife, patrolling coastal areas, mountainous terrains and rugged roads of rainforests. Every day brings a new challenge, dispatchers receive around 25.000 calls annually, every of which requires prompt reaction.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Follow aquarium enthusiasts Brett Raymer and Wayde King as they attempt to build some of the most luxurious fish tanks in the world. At Acrylic Tank Manufacturing, the brothers-in-law guide you through the design process and the building of their truly jaw-dropping aquariums. Experience the unveiling of finished tanks housed everywhere from restaurants and banks, to glamorous casinos and mansions. Join the duo in their Las Vegas workshop as they deliver some budget-shattering builds to their high-profile clientele.

programme.title: Animal Cops: Philadelphia
programme.desc: Animal Cops: Philadelphia follows the work of the Pennsylvania SPCA's Humane Law Enforcement team as they investigate cases of animal cruelty; rescue sick and abused animals and fight for justice on their behalf. The Pennsylvania SPCA's humane law enforcement officers cover an area of over 46,000 square miles from their headquarters in Philadelphia. The six offic ers with full police powers and six agent trainees are on call 24 hours a day seven days a week protecting the city's one and a half million pets.

programme.title: Animal Cops: Philadelphia
programme.desc: Animal Cops: Philadelphia follows the work of the Pennsylvania SPCA's Humane Law Enforcement team as they investigate cases of animal cruelty; rescue sick and abused animals and fight for justice on their behalf. The Pennsylvania SPCA's humane law enforcement officers cover an area of over 46,000 square miles from their headquarters in Philadelphia. The six offic ers with full police powers and six agent trainees are on call 24 hours a day seven days a week protecting the city's one and a half million pets.

programme.title: Animal ER
programme.desc: Owners Lisa and Callu are worried about Merlin, a Great Dane who goes over on his front toes when he walks. Neurologist Annette Wessman suspects a problem in his spine or skull.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: Alaskan Bush People is an American docudrama-style reality TV series revolving around the Brown family, members of which are trying to survive in the wilderness, far away from the society. Take a journey deep into Alaska's bush, where naturalist and adventurer Billy Brown, along with his wife, Ami, and their seven children, choose to live life on their own terms, connected to wild nature and bonded to each other.

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Jackson Galaxy is a cat behaviorist. He is the person who resolves conflicts or behavioral issues between the owners and their cats or even between the cats and other pets. These are attacks and misbehavior, and Jackson is a true cat-lover and a believer that any problem can be solved thanks to love, patience and proper handling. Taking good care of cats is a demanding process and a whole science, but in return you will get a loving and purring family member.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins
programme.desc: US reality TV show follows the Irwin family through their adventures in continuing Steve Irwin's legacy. The family share their wildlife experiences from their travels across the world. They show how they care for all the animals while giving insight into their family life at Australia Zoo where they live and work. The Australian family including mother Terri who is a naturalist and conservationist stars alongside daughter Bindi and son Robert who are fully immerse in animal life and their family.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego
programme.desc: "The Zoo: San Diego" provides a behind the scenes look at the daily lives of various species of animals and the teams that care for them. Featuring two parks, the San Diego Zoo and the San Diego Zoo Safari Park, as well as the San Diego Zoo Institute for Conservation Research, San Diego Zoo Global is home to more than 700 species and 6,500 animals. A wide range of animals are introduced, including pandas, giraffes, Galapagos tortoises, koalas, elephants, mountain lions, two baby cheetahs that are learning how to be ambassadors for their species and a flock of ostriches known as the "Spice Girls." Besides the animals, the keepers and veterinarians at both the Zoo and the Safari Park -- many of whom have dedicated their lives to caring for animals, discuss what it's like to be a part of this world-renowned zoo.

programme.title: The Aquarium
programme.desc: Reality-documentary series following the lives of the aquatic inhabitants at the Georgia Aquarium. The largest in the United States and fourth-largest in the world, the aquarium boasts a wide range of diverse inhabitants and explores the relationship between animals and trainers. The 10-million-gallon (38-million-litre) facility plays home to over 500 marine species including endangered penguins, rescued sea otters and recovering sea lions. The show reveals the difficulties that come with nursing and caring for such a wide variety of species. With many heart-warming scenes, the series beautifully reveals the friendships between the different species and how they learn to co-exist with each other.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet is a TV series entirely dedicated to love and care for animals. Thanks to a genius Dr. Jeff Young Denver's Planned Pethood Plus veterinary clinic is always busy and is taking care of 80,000-plus clients and their pets. Dr. Jeff's sharp surgical skills and his unconditional love for animals make him one of the most respected vets in the country. Dr. Jeff has a dedicated team of more than 30 veterinary staffers and once a month they go to remote locations where people do not have access to vets.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Follow aquarium enthusiasts Brett Raymer and Wayde King as they attempt to build some of the most luxurious fish tanks in the world. At Acrylic Tank Manufacturing, the brothers-in-law guide you through the design process and the building of their truly jaw-dropping aquariums. Experience the unveiling of finished tanks housed everywhere from restaurants and banks, to glamorous casinos and mansions. Join the duo in their Las Vegas workshop as they deliver some budget-shattering builds to their high-profile clientele.

The six offic ers with full police powers and six agent trainees are on call 24 hours a day seven days a week protecting the city's one and a half million pets.

programme.title: The Vet Life
programme.desc: The Vet Life is an amazing series revolving around three friends, three vets, Diarra Blue, Aubrey Ross, and Mike Lavigne and their everyday lives. These guys became friends back in University, then they worked in Las Vegas and finally moved to Texas and opened a full-service veterinary hospital of their own. The series highlights their daily routine, their duties at work and at home, their families and pets.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Treehouse Masters is an American reality television series hosted by Pete Nelson, a treehouse builder. Pete and his team design and build all types of treehouses for clients across the country. The clients and Pete's team are the people who never stop dreaming. You'll be surprised to know how many people want to get away from the noisy comfortable cities and live in close communion with mother nature. So getting a treehouse is their chance to live a dream. Every episode will amaze you because of Pete's talent and incredible imagination. He can build any type of a treehouse, starting from a small simple ones to most complex residences with all modern communication. Every wish of a customer will be heard and fulfilled.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees
programme.desc: Pit bulls are eager to please, faithful and enthusiastic friends and pleasant with children according to credible canine organizations. But they have fallen from grace. Now often associated with gang members, dog fighting and attacks. That's about to change. Animal Planet introduces you to this dog's greatest ally, and she's not a man - she's a fiery red-headed leading lady, and she's determined to end the needless hostility toward pit bulls. Meet Tia Maria Torres - 49-year-old mother, top pit bull trainer and founder and owner of Villalobos Rescue Center - the country's largest rescue facility for pit bulls.

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Jackson Galaxy is a cat behaviorist. He is the person who resolves conflicts or behavioral issues between the owners and their cats or even between the cats and other pets. These are attacks and misbehavior, and Jackson is a true cat-lover and a believer that any problem can be solved thanks to love, patience and proper handling. programme.title: Insane Pools Off the Deep End
programme.desc: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End is a home improvement show that follows pool designer Lucas Congdon and his team from Lucas Lagoons. Congdon and his crew renovate existing pools and build new ones on residential properties. Thanks to their unbelievable imagination, creativity and professionalism they can turn every pool into an ultimate backyard oasis for a whole family and transform it into a natural lagoon. They prefer working with hand-selected stones from Tennessee.

programme.title: Sharkwrecked: Crash Landing
programme.desc: Paul de Gelder and James Glancy bail out of an aircraft at 3500-ft to experience what it's like to crash land into some of the world's most remote and shark-infested waters.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: Alaskan Bush People is an American docudrama-style reality TV series revolving around the Brown family, members of which are trying to survive in the wilderness, far away from the society. Take a journey deep into Alaska's bush, where naturalist and adventurer Billy Brown, along with his wife, Ami, and their seven children, choose to live life on their own terms, connected to wild nature and bonded to each other.

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Reality series, set in Texas and similar to ''North Woods Law'', that follows daily lives of men and women who are Game Wardens and whose job is to protect deserts, lakes, woods, bayous, coasts and wild animals that live in the second-largest state in the U.S. These people have their plates full as they must deal with poachers, hunters who don't obey the law, smugglers, while they rescue injured wildlife and defend citizens.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: Nature's great predators are animals you don't want to come across, especially when you find yourself in their own backyard. In this heart-pumping documentary series, individuals share their stories of encounters with dangerous animals, reliving the frightful, life-threatening ordeal. With stories from across the world, we reveal the heart-in-mouth moments when these lucky individuals managed to escape the jaws of death. From a swimmer mauled by a bull shark in the Bahamas to a close shave with a grizzly bear in the mountains, these stories showcase the fearsome power of predators.

programme.title: Bad Dog
programme.desc: BAD DOG! is a hilarious hour of television documenting just how far pets can push their owners and still get unconditional love. The series highlights dogs that double as destroyers, hissing cats, cussing parrots, and the most fascinating four-legged escape artists ever caught on tape. Viewers will be treated to candid animal antics you truly have to see to believe. They are some of the baddest pets on the planet and you'll meet their owners who love them just the way they are. We span the globe to crown the Baddest of the Bad on BAD DOG!.

programme.title: Rugged Justice
programme.desc: Animal Planet's Rugged Justice follows the officers from Washington State's Department of Fish and Wildlife Law Enforcement as they guard the vast borders. It is an elite unit that protect people and wildlife, patrolling coastal areas, mountainous terrains and rugged roads of rainforests. Every day brings a new challenge, dispatchers receive around 25.000 calls annually, every of which requires prompt reaction.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Follow aquarium enthusiasts Brett Raymer and Wayde King as they attempt to build some of the most luxurious fish tanks in the world. At Acrylic Tank Manufacturing, the brothers-in-law guide you through the design process and the building of their truly jaw-dropping aquariums. Experience the unveiling of finished tanks housed everywhere from restaurants and banks, to glamorous casinos and mansions. Join the duo in their Las Vegas workshop as they deliver some budget-shattering builds to their high-profile clientele.

programme.title: Animal Cops: Philadelphia
programme.desc: Animal Cops: Philadelphia follows the work of the Pennsylvania SPCA's Humane Law Enforcement team as they investigate cases of animal cruelty; rescue sick and abused animals and fight for justice on their behalf. The Pennsylvania SPCA's humane law enforcement officers cover an area of over 46,000 square miles from their headquarters in Philadelphia. The six offic ers with full police powers and six agent trainees are on call 24 hours a day seven days a week protecting the city's one and a half million pets.

programme.title: Animal Cops: Philadelphia
programme.desc: Animal Cops: Philadelphia follows the work of the Pennsylvania SPCA's Humane Law Enforcement team as they investigate cases of animal cruelty; rescue sick and abused animals and fight for justice on their behalf. The Pennsylvania SPCA's humane law enforcement officers cover an area of over 46,000 square miles from their headquarters in Philadelphia. The six offic ers with full police powers and six agent trainees are on call 24 hours a day seven days a week protecting the city's one and a half million pets.

programme.title: Sharkwrecked: Crash Landing
programme.desc: Paul de Gelder and James Glancy bail out of an aircraft at 3500-ft to experience what it's like to crash land into some of the world's most remote and shark-infested waters.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: Alaskan Bush People is an American docudrama-style reality TV series revolving around the Brown family, members of which are trying to survive in the wilderness, far away from the society. Take a journey deep into Alaska's bush, where naturalist and adventurer Billy Brown, along with his wife, Ami, and their seven children, choose to live life on their own terms, connected to wild nature and bonded to each other.

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Jackson Galaxy is a cat behaviorist. He is the person who resolves conflicts or behavioral issues between the owners and their cats or even between the cats and other pets. These are attacks and misbehavior, and Jackson is a true cat-lover and a believer that any problem can be solved thanks to love, patience and proper handling. Taking good care of cats is a demanding process and a whole science, but in return you will get a loving and purring family member.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins
programme.desc: US reality TV show follows the Irwin family through their adventures in continuing Steve Irwin's legacy. The family share their wildlife experiences from their travels across the world. They show how they care for all the animals while giving insight into their family life at Australia Zoo where they live and work. The Australian family including mother Terri who is a naturalist and conservationist stars alongside daughter Bindi and son Robert who are fully immerse in animal life and their family.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego
programme.desc: "The Zoo: San Diego" provides a behind the scenes look at the daily lives of various species of animals and the teams that care for them. Featuring two parks, the San Diego Zoo and the San Diego Zoo Safari Park, as well as the San Diego Zoo Institute for Conservation Research, San Diego Zoo Global is home to more than 700 species and 6,500 animals. A wide range of animals are introduced, including pandas, giraffes, Galapagos tortoises, koalas, elephants, mountain lions, two baby cheetahs that are learning how to be ambassadors for their species and a flock of ostriches known as the "Spice Girls." Besides the animals, the keepers and veterinarians at both the Zoo and the Safari Park -- many of whom have dedicated their lives to caring for animals, discuss what it's like to be a part of this world-renowned zoo.

programme.title: The Aquarium
programme.desc: Reality-documentary series following the lives of the aquatic inhabitants at the Georgia Aquarium. The largest in the United States and fourth-largest in the world, the aquarium boasts a wide range of diverse inhabitants and explores the relationship between animals and trainers. The 10-million-gallon (38-million-litre) facility plays home to over 500 marine species including endangered penguins, rescued sea otters and recovering sea lions. The show reveals the difficulties that come with nursing and caring for such a wide variety of species. With many heart-warming scenes, the series beautifully reveals the friendships between the different species and how they learn to co-exist with each other.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet is a TV series entirely dedicated to love and care for animals. Thanks to a genius Dr. Jeff Young Denver's Planned Pethood Plus veterinary clinic is always busy and is taking care of 80,000-plus clients and their pets. Dr. Jeff's sharp surgical skills and his unconditional love for animals make him one of the most respected vets in the country. Dr. Jeff has a dedicated team of more than 30 veterinary staffers and once a month they go to remote locations where people do not have access to vets.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Follow aquarium enthusiasts Brett Raymer and Wayde King as they attempt to build some of the most luxurious fish tanks in the world. At Acrylic Tank Manufacturing, the brothers-in-law guide you through the design process and the building of their truly jaw-dropping aquariums. Experience the unveiling of finished tanks housed everywhere from restaurants and banks, to glamorous casinos and mansions. Join the duo in their Las Vegas workshop as they deliver some budget-shattering builds to their high-profile clientele.

programme.title: Animal Cops: Miami
programme.desc: Animal Cops: Miami is a documentary reality series following dedicated animal control officers as they provide a valuable service to the animals of Miami-Dade County. Keeping a close eye on the region's creatures, both wild and domesticated, the control officers visit various locations to investigate reports of injured or sick animals, and deplorable cases of animal cruelty, ensuring they are provided with the welfare they deserve. The series also follows individuals from the Everglades Outpost nature rehabilitation centre, as they investigate reports of animals being improperly released into the wetland area.

programme.title: Animal Cops: Miami
programme.desc: Animal Cops: Miami is a documentary reality series following dedicated animal control officers as they provide a valuable service to the animals of Miami-Dade County. Keeping a close eye on the region's creatures, both wild and domesticated, the control officers visit various locations to investigate reports of injured or sick animals, and deplorable cases of animal cruelty, ensuring they are provided with the welfare they deserve. programme.title: The Vet Life
programme.desc: The Vet Life is an amazing series revolving around three friends, three vets, Diarra Blue, Aubrey Ross, and Mike Lavigne and their everyday lives. These guys became friends back in University, then they worked in Las Vegas and finally moved to Texas and opened a full-service veterinary hospital of their own. The series highlights their daily routine, their duties at work and at home, their families and pets.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Treehouse Masters is an American reality television series hosted by Pete Nelson, a treehouse builder. Pete and his team design and build all types of treehouses for clients across the country. The clients and Pete's team are the people who never stop dreaming. You'll be surprised to know how many people want to get away from the noisy comfortable cities and live in close communion with mother nature. So getting a treehouse is their chance to live a dream. Every episode will amaze you because of Pete's talent and incredible imagination. He can build any type of a treehouse, starting from a small simple ones to most complex residences with all modern communication. Every wish of a customer will be heard and fulfilled.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees
programme.desc: Pit bulls are eager to please, faithful and enthusiastic friends and pleasant with children according to credible canine organizations. But they have fallen from grace. Now often associated with gang members, dog fighting and attacks. That's about to change. Animal Planet introduces you to this dog's greatest ally, and she's not a man - she's a fiery red-headed leading lady, and she's determined to end the needless hostility toward pit bulls. Meet Tia Maria Torres - 49-year-old mother, top pit bull trainer and founder and owner of Villalobos Rescue Center - the country's largest rescue facility for pit bulls.

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Jackson Galaxy is a cat behaviorist. He is the person who resolves conflicts or behavioral issues between the owners and their cats or even between the cats and other pets. programme.title: Insane Pools Off the Deep End
programme.desc: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End is a home improvement show that follows pool designer Lucas Congdon and his team from Lucas Lagoons. Congdon and his crew renovate existing pools and build new ones on residential properties. Thanks to their unbelievable imagination, creativity and professionalism they can turn every pool into an ultimate backyard oasis for a whole family and transform it into a natural lagoon. They prefer working with hand-selected stones from Tennessee.

programme.title: Guardians of Rescue
programme.desc: Follow a group of men and women coming from a range of backgrounds, united in their love for animals and in their mission to rescue them, as well as educate and motivate people to follow their lead. Their main concern is helping animals in need, but it is also strengthening the bond with animals that has always been present in human lives, emphasising the importance of nurturing that relationship.

programme.title: Animal ER
programme.desc: Owners Lisa and Callu are worried about Merlin, a Great Dane who goes over on his front toes when he walks. Neurologist Annette Wessman suspects a problem in his spine or skull.

programme.title: Hidden Histories
programme.desc: Delving into the mysteries of the past to shed light on the present.

programme.title: BBC World News America
programme.desc: News presenter Katty Kay keeps you up to date with all the latest breaking news from America and the rest of the world on BBC World News America. This world renowned news and current affairs program has been recognised for its exceptional reporting at the Emmy Awards. BBC World News America won two Emmy awards for its coverage of the conflicts in Syria and the Central African Republic. You can catch up with this award winning broadcast team as they air multiple times a day throughout the week.

programme.title: Newsnight
programme.desc: In-depth news and current affairs review of the main political and economic stories of the day, featuring robust interviews with senior government and opposition figures, business and union leaders, and analytical reports that delve behind the headlines. Regular presenters cross-examine studio guests on details of policies, priorities, actions and inactions, on a range of domestic UK and international topics. There are weekly features on the arts, sports and the world of technology, and editors are not afraid to venture into niche, specialist and exotic areas from space travel to animal psychology. If the BBC's flagship Radio 4 Today programme sets the early morning news agenda for the day, then its late-night TV equivalent often gives the people in power some sleepless nights.

programme.title: BBC World News America
programme.desc: News presenter Katty Kay keeps you up to date with all the latest breaking news from America and the rest of the world on BBC World News America. This world renowned news and current affairs program has been recognised for its exceptional reporting at the Emmy Awards. BBC World News America won two Emmy awards for its coverage of the conflicts in Syria and the Central African Republic. You can catch up with this award winning broadcast team as they air multiple times a day throughout the week.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC,which is designed to inform you on current affairs. The BBC is aims to be a totally impartial public service broadcaster, and was established by Royal Charter. The BBC is funded by a licence fee paid by British households, and is regulated by Ofcom. They aim to create high-quality content, in order to inform and educate, but also entertain, their audience Millions of people from all over the world watch content produced by the BBC, and they are well respected as a media company. It was founded in 1922, with its headquarters in Westminster, London.

programme.title: Newscast
programme.desc: Join BBC journalists including political editor Laura Kuenssberg, Europe editor Katya Adler, Brussels correspondent Adam Fleming and political correspondent Chris Mason in their weekly podcast discussing all of the news stories that matter to the people of the United Kingdom. The journalists know all about the stories that they're talking about - they interview the most important people involved in the stories that feature in the news. They speak of their knowledge and understanding of the news in a way that is understandable for all. Laura is often in a car in the middle of a city where big politics stories are happening. Katya, Adam and Chris are usually in the studio. They regularly talk about Brexit and what is going to happen when the United Kingdom leaves the European Union.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC,which is designed to inform you on current affairs. The BBC is aims to be a totally impartial public service broadcaster, and was established by Royal Charter. The BBC is funded by a licence fee paid by British households, and is regulated by Ofcom. programme.title: Tech Now
programme.desc: Andrew Rogers explores new tech trials helping people stay underwater for longer.

programme.title: Newsday
programme.desc: "Good Morning Asia, hello World." Join the news teams from BBC World News in London and Singapore. This live news and current affairs program is broadcast globally and focuses on all the latest news and breaking developing stories that matter around the world. The show is usually presented by Rico Hizon in Singapore and Kasia Madera in London. Broadcasting live at midnight GMT on both BBC World News and the BBC News channel, the show is broadcast in the morning in Asia and therefore is marketed as a morning show for people watching around the country. The show is often followed by Asia Business Report live from Singapore which reports on all the latest economy and business figures from the country.

programme.title: Business Today
programme.desc: The latest business news from Singapore and around the world.

programme.title: BBC Sport
programme.desc: A round-up of the day's sporting action.

programme.title: Asia Specific
programme.desc: Asia Specific brings you essential insights and conversations on the stories and trends shaping Asia Pacific, unpacked by those who know it best. Hosted in Singapore by Mariko Oi, alongside BBC experts in Beijing, Bangkok and beyond, you'll hear Asian perspectives on international issues and in-depth analysis on news from a region that's home to nearly 2.5 billion people.

programme.title: Focus on Africa
programme.desc: Focus on Africa is a BBC news program broadcast globally and on local partner channels of the BBC in African countries. The program used to be presented by Komla Dumor each weekday from its inception until his death in 2014; now it is hosted by Sophie Ikenye, a news presenter from Kenya. The program includes news, sport and business from across Africa and the rest of the globe. Get the top African stories and keep up with the latest international events.

programme.title: BBC World News America
programme.desc: News presenter Katty Kay keeps you up to date with all the latest breaking news from America and the rest of the world on BBC World News America. This world renowned news and current affairs program has been recognised for its exceptional reporting at the Emmy Awards. BBC World News America won two Emmy awards for its coverage of the conflicts in Syria and the Central African Republic. You can catch up with this award winning broadcast team as they air multiple times a day throughout the week.

programme.title: Newsnight
programme.desc: In-depth news and current affairs review of the main political and economic stories of the day, featuring robust interviews with senior government and opposition figures, business and union leaders, and analytical reports that delve behind the headlines. Regular presenters cross-examine studio guests on details of policies, priorities, actions and inactions, on a range of domestic UK and international topics. There are weekly features on the arts, sports and the world of technology, and editors are not afraid to venture into niche, specialist and exotic areas from space travel to animal psychology. If the BBC's flagship Radio 4 Today programme sets the early morning news agenda for the day, then its late-night TV equivalent often gives the people in power some sleepless nights.

programme.title: BBC World News America
programme.desc: News presenter Katty Kay keeps you up to date with all the latest breaking news from America and the rest of the world on BBC World News America. This world renowned news and current affairs program has been recognised for its exceptional reporting at the Emmy Awards. BBC World News America won two Emmy awards for its coverage of the conflicts in Syria and the Central African Republic. You can catch up with this award winning broadcast team as they air multiple times a day throughout the week.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC,which is designed to inform you on current affairs. The BBC is aims to be a totally impartial public service broadcaster, and was established by Royal Charter. The BBC is funded by a licence fee paid by British households, and is regulated by Ofcom. They aim to create high-quality content, in order to inform and educate, but also entertain, their audience Millions of people from all over the world watch content produced by the BBC, and they are well respected as a media company. It was founded in 1922, with its headquarters in Westminster, London.

programme.title: Newscast
programme.desc: Join BBC journalists including political editor Laura Kuenssberg, Europe editor Katya Adler, Brussels correspondent Adam Fleming and political correspondent Chris Mason in their weekly podcast discussing all of the news stories that matter to the people of the United Kingdom. The journalists know all about the stories that they're talking about - they interview the most important people involved in the stories that feature in the news. They speak of their knowledge and understanding of the news in a way that is understandable for all. Laura is often in a car in the middle of a city where big politics stories are happening. Katya, Adam and Chris are usually in the studio. They regularly talk about Brexit and what is going to happen when the United Kingdom leaves the European Union.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest news from the BBC,which is designed to inform you on current affairs. The BBC is aims to be a totally impartial public service broadcaster, and was established by Royal Charter. The BBC is funded by a licence fee paid by British households, and is regulated by Ofcom. They aim to create high-quality content, in order to inform and educate, but also entertain, their audience Millions of people from all over the world watch content produced by the BBC, and they are well respected as a media company. It was founded in 1922, with its headquarters in Westminster, London.

programme.title: The Climate Question
programme.desc: A global programme that reflects the variety of takes on climate change, how best to understand it and the world's attempts to avert it, temper it or adapt to it. It is not about questioning whether climate change is happening, it's about finding the best ways to respond to it. This is sharp-edged, analytical inquiry. Hard scrutiny, touched with a sense of adventure and discovery, and where we can find it, hope. It includes stories from across the world on why we find it so hard to save our own planet, and how we might change that.

programme.title: Newsday
programme.desc: "Good Morning Asia, hello World." Join the news teams from BBC World News in London and Singapore. This live news and current affairs program is broadcast globally and focuses on all the latest news and breaking developing stories that matter around the world. The show is usually presented by Rico Hizon in Singapore and Kasia Madera in London. Broadcasting live at midnight GMT on both BBC World News and the BBC News channel, the show is broadcast in the morning in Asia and therefore is marketed as a morning show for people watching around the country. The show is often followed by Asia Business Report live from Singapore which reports on all the latest economy and business figures from the country.

programme.title: Focus on Africa
programme.desc: Focus on Africa is a BBC news program broadcast globally and on local partner channels of the BBC in African countries. The program used to be presented by Komla Dumor each weekday from its inception until his death in 2014; now it is hosted by Sophie Ikenye, a news presenter from Kenya. The program includes news, sport and business from across Africa and the rest of the globe. Get the top African stories and keep up with the latest international events.

programme.title: Спецы
programme.desc: Макаров решает выяснить, почему Богдана стала к нему так холодна. Богдана передает ему рассказ Игоря Карпенко. Макаров рассказывает, что пытался прищучить парня-насильника (сына депутата Кушнира) и нашел доказательства его вины. Однако Кушнир отмазал сынка, а помог ему в этом именно Карпенко. Они перевернули ситуацию с ног на голову и поставили его перед выбором: либо он увольняется по собственному желанию, либо его уволят с волчьим билетом. Макаров продолжает сомневаться в том, что грабитель Кролл – убийца его сестры. После проведенного расследования он выясняет, что в день, когда убили Ирину, Кролл находился в другом месте. У него есть любимая женщина – Надя. Она от него беременна, и они собирались пожениться. В день, когда убили Ирину, Кролл обнес дом Надиного начальника – по наводке Нади и с ее непосредственным участием. Поэтому он и не стал ничего рассказывать – боялся "спалить" свою беременную возлюбленную. А вот она, узнав, что Кроллу "светит пятнашка", во всем призналась и все рассказала. Щеглов и Леся вместе отправляются по служебным делам. И, воспользовавшись этим, Леся объясняет Щеглову, что байкер, к которому Щеглов ее приревновал, ее родной брат Остап.

programme.title: Спецы
programme.desc: Ройзман, применив свои профессиональные навыки криминалиста, совершает подлог: оставляет отпечатки пальцев Макарова на орудии убийства, возле убитого серийного маньяка, который подозревался в убийстве женщин. Макарова отстраняют от работы, отныне он под следствием. Макаров понимает, что обязан доказать свою невиновность. Щеглов продолжает ухаживать за Лесей. Он снова приносит ей цветы и смущенно приглашает на свидание. Леся, почти неожиданно для себя, соглашается. Макаров хладнокровно распутывает и это дело. В довершение ему удается поймать настоящего преступника. С Макарова снимают обвинения. Он один знает, как улики оказались на месте преступления. Ройзман раскаивается. Макаров прощает его и уличает Карпенко. А затем берет с Карпенко слово, что тот оплатит операцию жене Ройзмана. Взамен Макаров обещает никому и ничего не рассказывать. Карпенко соглашается.

programme.title: Спецы
programme.desc: Начальник Экспертно-криминалистической лаборатории МВД Андрей Макаров - настоящий спец. Вместе со своими подчиненными - экспертом Ройзманом, компьютерщиком Стасом Кимом и молоденькой практиканткой Лесей Бильчак он выезжает на места преступлений в составе оперативно-следственной бригады, в которую также входят оперативники угро Киценко и Щеглов и следователь Богдана Ковальская. Год назад Макарова устранили от расследования смерти девушки, в которой был замешан депутатский сынок Кушнир. А месяц назад произошло убийство сестры Макарова Ирины, которое списали на обычное ограбление. Макаров уверен, что это было преднамеренное преступление, и он полон решимости найти убийцу.Макаров работает в связке со следователем Богданой Ковальской. Мужа у женщины нет, но есть любовник - судебный прокурор Карпенко, который год назад отстранил Макарова от работы. Макарову предстоит расследовать множество запутанных дел, разоблачить нечистых на руку чиновников, найти убийцу сестры и отстоять свое чувство к Богдане.

programme.title: Спецы
programme.desc: Начальник Экспертно-криминалистической лаборатории МВД Андрей Макаров - настоящий спец. programme.title: Контакт
programme.desc: Спецслужбы проводят взрывные работы на участке, где зафиксированы магнитные аномалии. Совершенно случайно в зоне взрыва оказываются три человека: преступник Владимир Голенко, фотохудожник Олег Малинин и неудачливый писатель Венедикт Тартаковский. В результате взрыва между этими людьми возникает странная связь – фотограф Малинин может читать мысли преступника Голенко, и даже видеть окружающий мир его глазами, а писатель Тартаковский может полностью управлять действиями Голенко и при этом общаться с Малининым на расстоянии. Тартаковский, получив в свое полное распоряжение преступника Голенко, решает его руками отомстить всем, кто мешал ему в жизни. Город захлестывает череда кровавых преступлений...

programme.title: Контакт
programme.desc: Спецслужбы проводят взрывные работы на участке, где зафиксированы магнитные аномалии. programme.desc: Спецслужбы проводят взрывные работы на участке, где зафиксированы магнитные аномалии. Тартаковский, получив в свое полное распоряжение преступника Голенко, решает его руками отомстить всем, кто мешал ему в жизни. Город захлестывает череда кровавых преступлений...

programme.title: Контакт
programme.desc: Голенко убивает Катю. Малинин в отчаянии. Бражник не верит в видения Малинина и считает его сообщником убийцы, тем более, что в квартире Кати найдены его отпечатки пальцев. Малинина объявляют в розыск. Он скрывается на даче Кати. Тартаковский тем временем задумывает новое убийство - на этот раз, жертва - Татьяна, девушка, которая его отвергла. Малинин снова это "видит". Он пытается самостоятельно найти Голенко, через Васильченко, адрес которого он "подсмотрел", когда Голенко с ним встречался. Но Васильченко подозревает в Малинине полицейского. Он бьет его по голове, приковывает наручниками к батарее и сбегает. Голенко, который в этот момент, уже готов убить Татьяну, неожиданно теряет сознание. Тартаковский озабочен, что произошло с его марионеткой? Малинин удается выбраться из квартиры Васильченко. Он приходит к Николаевой и все ей рассказывает.

programme.title: Отважные
programme.desc: Сериал рассказывает о работе специального подразделения полиции, занимающегося проблемами домашнего насилия. Четыре главные героини помогают женщинам, детям и даже мужчинам, страдающим от тирании, побоев, унижений и других способов угнетения со стороны близких людей. Героини сериала будут попадать в сложные и опасные ситуации, спасая жизни и восстанавливая справедливость. Каждая женщина из этой четверки тоже прошла через насилие: у каждой – своя история, скелет в шкафу и сильная мотивация заниматься именно этим делом.

programme.title: Отважные

programme.title: Консультант
programme.desc: Талантливый криминалист Борис Крылов попадает вместе с отцом в автомобильную аварию. Отец погибает на месте, а Крылов покидает больницу в инвалидном кресле. Он уверен, что авария была подстроена и убийство отца, известного хирурга, было спланировано. Чтобы провести собственное расследование, Крылов соглашается вернуться к работе в полиции…

programme.title: Консультант
programme.desc: Крылов обнаруживает странную статистику смертей пациентов в клинике, где работал его отец и просит свою помощницу и подругу Матвеевну устроиться туда на работу "под прикрытием". Борису не дают покоя несколько фактов в деле убийства сына олигарха. Крылов проводит необычный следственный эксперимент и понимает, как именно было совершено это преступление…

programme.title: Консультант
programme.desc: Талантливый криминалист Борис Крылов попадает вместе с отцом в автомобильную аварию. Отец погибает на месте, а Крылов покидает больницу в инвалидном кресле. А месяц назад произошло убийство сестры Макарова Ирины, которое списали на обычное ограбление. Макаров уверен, что это было преднамеренное преступление, и он полон решимости найти убийцу.Макаров работает в связке со следователем Богданой Ковальской. Мужа у женщины нет, но есть любовник - судебный прокурор Карпенко, который год назад отстранил Макарова от работы. Макарову предстоит расследовать множество запутанных дел, разоблачить нечистых на руку чиновников, найти убийцу сестры и отстоять свое чувство к Богдане.

programme.title: Горячая точка
programme.desc: Несколько бомб заложено экстремистской группой защитников окружающей среды. У Группы Один есть только девяносто минут, чтобы предотвратить взрывы. В то время как Спайк обезвреживает одну бомбу, Лу случайно наступает на мину. Спайк любым способом пытается спасти своего друга. Но когда стало ясно, что любая попытка спасти его, скорее всего, приведет к смерти Спайка, Лу принёс себя в жертву.

programme.title: Горячая точка
programme.desc: Сотрудники полиции участвуют во всех особо важных делах – спасении заложников и переговорах с террористами, эвакуации жителей и обезвреживании бомб, охоте на серийного убийцу и даже решении семейных конфликтов. В арсенале у участников ГСР (группы стратегического реагирования) не только высокотехнологичное оружие, но еще и быстрый ум, интуиция и… багаж собственных проблем и травм, которые часто влияют на их работу.

programme.title: Консультант
programme.desc: Талантливый криминалист Борис Крылов попадает вместе с отцом в автомобильную аварию. Отец погибает на месте, а Крылов покидает больницу в инвалидном кресле. Он уверен, что авария была подстроена и убийство отца, известного хирурга, было спланировано. Чтобы провести собственное расследование, Крылов соглашается вернуться к работе в полиции…

programme.title: Консультант
programme.desc: Крылов обнаруживает странную статистику смертей пациентов в клинике, где работал его отец и просит свою помощницу и подругу Матвеевну устроиться туда на работу "под прикрытием". Борису не дают покоя несколько фактов в деле убийства сына олигарха. Крылов проводит необычный следственный эксперимент и понимает, как именно было совершено это преступление…

programme.title: Консультант
programme.desc: Талантливый криминалист Борис Крылов попадает вместе с отцом в автомобильную аварию. Отец погибает на месте, а Крылов покидает больницу в инвалидном кресле. programme.desc: Талантливый криминалист Борис Крылов попадает вместе с отцом в автомобильную аварию. Отец погибает на месте, а Крылов покидает больницу в инвалидном кресле. programme.title: Спецы
programme.desc: Начальник Экспертно-криминалистической лаборатории МВД Андрей Макаров - настоящий спец. Вместе со своими подчиненными - экспертом Ройзманом, компьютерщиком Стасом Кимом и молоденькой практиканткой Лесей Бильчак он выезжает на места преступлений в составе оперативно-следственной бригады, в которую также входят оперативники угро Киценко и Щеглов и следователь Богдана Ковальская. Год назад Макарова устранили от расследования смерти девушки, в которой был замешан депутатский сынок Кушнир. А месяц назад произошло убийство сестры Макарова Ирины, которое списали на обычное ограбление. Макаров уверен, что это было преднамеренное преступление, и он полон решимости найти убийцу.Макаров работает в связке со следователем Богданой Ковальской. Мужа у женщины нет, но есть любовник - судебный прокурор Карпенко, который год назад отстранил Макарова от работы. Макарову предстоит расследовать множество запутанных дел, разоблачить нечистых на руку чиновников, найти убийцу сестры и отстоять свое чувство к Богдане.

programme.title: Контакт
programme.desc: Спецслужбы проводят взрывные работы на участке, где зафиксированы магнитные аномалии. Совершенно случайно в зоне взрыва оказываются три человека: преступник Владимир Голенко, фотохудожник Олег Малинин и неудачливый писатель Венедикт Тартаковский. В результате взрыва между этими людьми возникает странная связь – фотограф Малинин может читать мысли преступника Голенко, и даже видеть окружающий мир его глазами, а писатель Тартаковский может полностью управлять действиями Голенко и при этом общаться с Малининым на расстоянии. Тартаковский, получив в свое полное распоряжение преступника Голенко, решает его руками отомстить всем, кто мешал ему в жизни. Город захлестывает череда кровавых преступлений...

programme.title: Контакт
programme.desc: Спецслужбы проводят взрывные работы на участке, где зафиксированы магнитные аномалии. Совершенно случайно в зоне взрыва оказываются три человека: преступник Владимир Голенко, фотохудожник Олег Малинин и неудачливый писатель Венедикт Тартаковский. В результате взрыва между этими людьми возникает странная связь – фотограф Малинин может читать мысли преступника Голенко, и даже видеть окружающий мир его глазами, а писатель Тартаковский может полностью управлять действиями Голенко и при этом общаться с Малининым на расстоянии. Тартаковский, получив в свое полное распоряжение преступника Голенко, решает его руками отомстить всем, кто мешал ему в жизни. Город захлестывает череда кровавых преступлений...

programme.title: Контакт
programme.desc: Голенко убивает Катю. Малинин в отчаянии. Бражник не верит в видения Малинина и считает его сообщником убийцы, тем более, что в квартире Кати найдены его отпечатки пальцев. Малинина объявляют в розыск. Он скрывается на даче Кати. Тартаковский тем временем задумывает новое убийство - на этот раз, жертва - Татьяна, девушка, которая его отвергла. Малинин снова это "видит". Он пытается самостоятельно найти Голенко, через Васильченко, адрес которого он "подсмотрел", когда Голенко с ним встречался. Но Васильченко подозревает в Малинине полицейского. Он бьет его по голове, приковывает наручниками к батарее и сбегает. Голенко, который в этот момент, уже готов убить Татьяну, неожиданно теряет сознание. Тартаковский озабочен, что произошло с его марионеткой? Малинин удается выбраться из квартиры Васильченко. Он приходит к Николаевой и все ей рассказывает.

programme.title: Контакт
programme.desc: Спецслужбы проводят взрывные работы на участке, где зафиксированы магнитные аномалии. Совершенно случайно в зоне взрыва оказываются три человека: преступник Владимир Голенко, фотохудожник Олег Малинин и неудачливый писатель Венедикт Тартаковский. programme.title: Отважные
programme.desc: Сериал рассказывает о работе специального подразделения полиции, занимающегося проблемами домашнего насилия. Четыре главные героини помогают женщинам, детям и даже мужчинам, страдающим от тирании, побоев, унижений и других способов угнетения со стороны близких людей. Героини сериала будут попадать в сложные и опасные ситуации, спасая жизни и восстанавливая справедливость. Каждая женщина из этой четверки тоже прошла через насилие: у каждой – своя история, скелет в шкафу и сильная мотивация заниматься именно этим делом.

programme.title: Отважные

programme.title: Консультант

Он уверен, что авария была подстроена и убийство отца, известного хирурга, было спланировано. Чтобы провести собственное расследование, Крылов соглашается вернуться к работе в полиции…

programme.title: Консультант
programme.desc: Расследование в больнице не продвигается, улик у Крылова нет. Голубев рассказывает Алеше, что он его кровный отец. Лариса лжет Крылову по непонятным причинам. На рассвете в парке обнаруживают тело обеспеченной женщины. Она была известна в городе, как жестокая и несправедливая руководительница, увольнявшая людей за малейшие недочеты. Поэтому подозреваемых много.

programme.title: Консультант
programme.desc: Борис выясняет, что нападение на Ларису — инсценировка. Но бывшая жена запутывает мужчину. Борис признается Анне в любви, но ей не до романтики: проблемы с сыном усугубляются, Алеша обвиняет мать в том, что она скрыла правду об отце. В убийстве женщины в парке подозревают ее многочисленных ухажеров. Но Крылову удается установить реальную цепь событий.

programme.title: Консультант
programme.desc: Крылов узнает, что погиб один из подозреваемых в деле об аварии. Кто-то считает эксперта серьезным врагом. Анна в шоке от новости о том, что сын связался с Голубевым. В безлюдной части города обнаружено тело мужчины в женском облачении. Погибший — трансвестит, завсегдатай престижного клуба для лиц нетрадиционной ориентации. Когда Крылов начал копаться в деле, убили еще одного постоянного посетителя клуба.

programme.title: Контакт
programme.desc: Спецслужбы проводят взрывные работы на участке, где зафиксированы магнитные аномалии. programme.title: Контакт
programme.desc: Спецслужбы проводят взрывные работы на участке, где зафиксированы магнитные аномалии. Совершенно случайно в зоне взрыва оказываются три человека: преступник Владимир Голенко, фотохудожник Олег Малинин и неудачливый писатель Венедикт Тартаковский. В результате взрыва между этими людьми возникает странная связь – фотограф Малинин может читать мысли преступника Голенко, и даже видеть окружающий мир его глазами, а писатель Тартаковский может полностью управлять действиями Голенко и при этом общаться с Малининым на расстоянии. Тартаковский, получив в свое полное распоряжение преступника Голенко, решает его руками отомстить всем, кто мешал ему в жизни. Город захлестывает череда кровавых преступлений...

programme.title: Спецы
programme.desc: Начальник Экспертно-криминалистической лаборатории МВД Андрей Макаров - настоящий спец. Вместе со своими подчиненными - экспертом Ройзманом, компьютерщиком Стасом Кимом и молоденькой практиканткой Лесей Бильчак он выезжает на места преступлений в составе оперативно-следственной бригады, в которую также входят оперативники угро Киценко и Щеглов и следователь Богдана Ковальская. Год назад Макарова устранили от расследования смерти девушки, в которой был замешан депутатский сынок Кушнир. А месяц назад произошло убийство сестры Макарова Ирины, которое списали на обычное ограбление. Макаров уверен, что это было преднамеренное преступление, и он полон решимости найти убийцу.Макаров работает в связке со следователем Богданой Ковальской. Мужа у женщины нет, но есть любовник - судебный прокурор Карпенко, который год назад отстранил Макарова от работы. Макарову предстоит расследовать множество запутанных дел, разоблачить нечистых на руку чиновников, найти убийцу сестры и отстоять свое чувство к Богдане.

programme.title: Горячая точка
programme.desc: Сотрудники полиции участвуют во всех особо важных делах – спасении заложников и переговорах с террористами, эвакуации жителей и обезвреживании бомб, охоте на серийного убийцу и даже решении семейных конфликтов. В арсенале у участников ГСР (группы стратегического реагирования) не только высокотехнологичное оружие, но еще и быстрый ум, интуиция и… багаж собственных проблем и травм, которые часто влияют на их работу.

programme.title: Горячая точка
programme.desc: Сотрудники полиции участвуют во всех особо важных делах – спасении заложников и переговорах с террористами, эвакуации жителей и обезвреживании бомб, охоте на серийного убийцу и даже решении семейных конфликтов. programme.title: Консультант
programme.desc: Талантливый криминалист Борис Крылов попадает вместе с отцом в автомобильную аварию. Отец погибает на месте, а Крылов покидает больницу в инвалидном кресле. Он уверен, что авария была подстроена и убийство отца, известного хирурга, было спланировано. Чтобы провести собственное расследование, Крылов соглашается вернуться к работе в полиции…

programme.title: Консультант
programme.desc: Расследование в больнице не продвигается, улик у Крылова нет. Голубев рассказывает Алеше, что он его кровный отец. Лариса лжет Крылову по непонятным причинам. На рассвете в парке обнаруживают тело обеспеченной женщины. Она была известна в городе, как жестокая и несправедливая руководительница, увольнявшая людей за малейшие недочеты. Поэтому подозреваемых много.

programme.title: Консультант
programme.desc: Борис выясняет, что нападение на Ларису — инсценировка. Но бывшая жена запутывает мужчину. Борис признается Анне в любви, но ей не до романтики: проблемы с сыном усугубляются, Алеша обвиняет мать в том, что она скрыла правду об отце. В убийстве женщины в парке подозревают ее многочисленных ухажеров. Но Крылову удается установить реальную цепь событий.

programme.title: Консультант
programme.desc: Крылов узнает, что погиб один из подозреваемых в деле об аварии. Кто-то считает эксперта серьезным врагом. Анна в шоке от новости о том, что сын связался с Голубевым. В безлюдной части города обнаружено тело мужчины в женском облачении. Погибший — трансвестит, завсегдатай престижного клуба для лиц нетрадиционной ориентации. Когда Крылов начал копаться в деле, убили еще одного постоянного посетителя клуба.

programme.title: Контакт
programme.desc: Голенко убивает Катю. Малинин в отчаянии. Бражник не верит в видения Малинина и считает его сообщником убийцы, тем более, что в квартире Кати найдены его отпечатки пальцев. Малинина объявляют в розыск. Он скрывается на даче Кати. Тартаковский тем временем задумывает новое убийство - на этот раз, жертва - Татьяна, девушка, которая его отвергла. Малинин снова это "видит". Он пытается самостоятельно найти Голенко, через Васильченко, адрес которого он "подсмотрел", когда Голенко с ним встречался. Но Васильченко подозревает в Малинине полицейского. Он бьет его по голове, приковывает наручниками к батарее и сбегает. Голенко, который в этот момент, уже готов убить Татьяну, неожиданно теряет сознание. Тартаковский озабочен, что произошло с его марионеткой? Малинин удается выбраться из квартиры Васильченко. Он приходит к Николаевой и все ей рассказывает.

programme.title: Контакт
programme.desc: Спецслужбы проводят взрывные работы на участке, где зафиксированы магнитные аномалии. programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: The Amazing World of Gumball revolves around the life of Gumball Watterson a 12-year-old cat who attends middle school in the fictional city of Elmore. Accompanied by his adoptive goldfish brother and best friend Darwin he frequently finds himself involved in various shenanigans around the city during which he interacts with his other family members - sister Anais and parents Nicole and Richard - and an extended supporting cast of characters. With relatable themes and a unique cast of characters The Amazing World of Gumball exemplifies the funny amazing sweet and optimistic side of kids' everyday life. Injected with a good deal of humor and unpredictable nonsense Gumball's world reflects the modern family and everyday issues that kids understand.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: The Wattersons try and reconnect Darwin to his fish roots. When Mom sees Darwin gazing longingly at a fish-tank she thinks their mammalian lifestyle isn't fulfilling her adopted son and deep down he longs to connect with his fishy roots. So the family try to re-connect him with his aquatic culture; they try fish-food fish-language even fish clothes. But when none of it works they realize they may have to let him go.

programme.desc: The Wattersons are a totally normal family. Dad is your regular 6"4 pink rabbit who stays at home while Mom works in a rainbow factory. Their kids are pretty standard too - there's Gumball, a blue cat with a giant head, Anais, a 4 year old genius bunny, and Darwin, a pet goldfish that became part of the family when he sprouted legs. At the heart of the show is Gumball, who faces the trials and tribulations of any twelve-year-old kid - like being chased by a rampaging T-Rex, sleeping rough when a robot steals his identity, or dressing as a cheerleader and doing the splits to impress the girl of his dreams. Simple everyday issues we've all been through. Gumball's hometown of Elmore is every bit as commonplace… a cactus waters his front lawn, a furry slug drives to work, and on the corner a balloon, a potato and a ghost all wait for the school bus. Welcome to The Amazing World of Gumball, where normal just got a little bit weird…

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Anais has made a new friend, so Gumball and Darwin immediately assume there must be something wrong with him. / Gumball and Darwin think it's one of those days when nothing interesting is happening. But as they walk around Elmore it appears exciting things are happening just not to them. / Gumball and Darwin have to stop Alan from becoming Class President of Elmore Junior High. / Nicole remembers the day she first met Richard, and the different choices she could have made.

programme.title: Lamput
programme.desc: Lamput faints of thirst on a desert highway, so already it's not a great day for the little orange shape-shifter. Add to that the fact that Specs and Skinny just happen by in a lockup van, and things go south pretty promptly. Specs and Skinny learn a valuable lesson: maybe if you're going to anger a morphing super-blob by throwing them in the back of a van and withholding precious water, you shouldn't do it whilst driving by a 100 foot cliff drop down to the open ocean. Hopefully these Docs are better swimmers than your average academic.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball‌
programme.desc: In Elmore, reality bends and family life gets weird. Gumball pulls Darwin, Anais, and the whole town into adventures - from fighting evil fast food to dealing with an AI crushing on his mom. The show's so wild, it needed a new name.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball‌
programme.desc: In Elmore, reality bends and family life gets weird. Gumball pulls Darwin, Anais, and the whole town into adventures - from fighting evil fast food to dealing with an AI crushing on his mom. The show's so wild, it needed a new name.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Dad discovers that Granny Jojo and Louie plan to get married and move to Florida. To stop this happening he adopts Louie so that he can forbid him from marrying Granny Jojo. / After they receive an extravagant invitation to Masami's birthday party, Gumball and Darwin are anxious to find just the right gift for her. / Gumball decides that the best way to prove to Mr. Fitzgerald that he's good enough for Penny is to become his apprentice for the day.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Gumball sets out to prove to Penny's father that he's good enough for his daughter. Gumball decides that the best way to prove to Mr. Fitzgerald that he's good enough for Penny is to become his apprentice for the day. The problem is, Mr. Fitzgerald has an important interview and Gumball's enthusiastic attempts to help him might actually do more harm than good, both to Mr. Fitzgerald's business and to Gumball's future with Penny.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: When Grandpa Louie gives them a cheque, the Watterson kids argue over how to spend the money. / When they find Anais training herself for a brutal showdown Gumball and Darwin realise that their sister is being pestered at school by an annoying kid: Billy. / An impromptu hug with a stranger at school leaves Gumball in an increasingly awkward social situation. / Mom and the kids depart for their hard day's work leaving a seemingly lazy Dad half-asleep on the sofa. Mom has given him one very simple job: buy mayonnaise. Director: Mic Graves,.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin, Starfire, Cyborg, Beast Boy and Raven continue the fun in season seven of TEEN TITANS GO! with all-new comedic adventures, giving viewers a look at what life is really like as a teen super hero ... once the cape comes off. Inspired by and featuring the principal voice cast of the original Teen Titans series, this character-driven comedy - based upon DC characters - focuses on the funny that happens in between saving the world and living together as teenagers without adult supervision. With epic staring contests to decide who does the laundry, a series of quests and battles to construct the perfect sandwich or fighting crime in Jump City, one thing is for sure - these Titans are always ready for an adventure, inside the house and out.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek
programme.desc: Craig and his two best friends, Kelsey and JP, are always going on adventures in the untamed suburban wilderness known as the Creek - a kid utopia where tribes of children rule over tree forts and bike ramps, making up an entire kid society. Each episode finds the kids either venturing into unexplored areas of the Creek, encountering new Creek Kids, or just getting into trouble at their hang out - the Stump.

programme.title: Lana Longbeard
programme.desc: Lana is a super-feisty, forward-thinking and passionate 11-year-old girl, who is also the heir to her father's adventuring ship, the Mighty Windbreaker. Along with her captain dad and his diverse crew (an orc, a dwarf, a barbarian and a cyclops), she sails across the Ten Realms, dreaming of becoming one of the greatest adventurers of all time. But first, she must overcome some challenging obstacles: impulsivity, stubbornness, extreme curiosity, disdain for rules … and a love of pancakes. All the best things about her!

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: The Wattersons' search for a parking space at the mall takes a little longer than expected. When the Wattersons arrive at the mall for a day of shopping, they struggle to find a space in the parking lot. They search for a space everywhere -- using all their intelligence, cunning and trickery -- but as the day goes on, the desperate hunt for a space becomes more important than the trip to the mall itself.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin see an advert for the latest, cutting-edge Bobert operating system and excitedly talk Bobert into downloading it. At first it seems like a massive improvement, but the many flaws in the new operating system become increasingly apparent. After the upgraded Bobert malfunctions one too many times, the kids decide to reinstall his old operating system. But will they be able to downgrade from the upgrade and get their old friend back?

programme.title: Clarence
programme.desc: Ren Faire: Clarence and his pals venture to the Aberdale Renaissance Faire. Clarence confuses a medieval play for reality, and vows to stop the "evil" black knight from getting the princess. / Time Crimes: When Clarence is convinced he has the power to manipulate time he vows to only use his "abilities" for good. However, a day at school puts his morals to the test when he's given the ultimate choice - to help his friends or pause time in the name of fun.

programme.title: Clarence
programme.desc: Follow the daily adventures of a 10-year-old boy named Clarence, and his two best friends Sumo and Jeff. Clarence lives with his mother Mary and her boyfriend Chad in the fictional town of Aberdale, and he is optimistic, curious, honest and quirky boy, who sees the best in everyone and gets himself in a variety of funny situations and everyday problems, which he solves with lots of imagination and with the help from his friends.

programme.title: Regular Show: The Lost Tapes
programme.desc: A broken VHS tape needs to be fixed.

programme.title: Regular Show: The Lost Tapes
programme.desc: Benson learns a better way to motivate.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: Mordecai the blue jay and Rigby the raccoon hate having to do work as groundskeepers at the local park, trying to slack off whenever they can. When they have simple problems to solve, they often lead to a surreal, extreme, and often supernatural misadventures. Usually this makes their boss, Benson (a gumball machine) extremely angry and on the verge to fire them and annoys their coworker, Skips (a yeti, voiced by Mark Hamill). The pair are always saved by the other manager/owner Pops (a man with a lollipop-shaped head) as he enjoys their constant antics. Co-workers Muscle-Man (an overweight, green man) and Hi-Five Ghost sometimes get involved in the shenanigans, but usually find a way out and leave Mordecai and Rigby in the firing line.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: The Wattersons are a totally normal family. Dad is your regular 6"4 pink rabbit who stays at home while Mom works in a rainbow factory. Their kids are pretty standard too - there's Gumball, a blue cat with a giant head, Anais, a 4 year old genius bunny, and Darwin, a pet goldfish that became part of the family when he sprouted legs. At the heart of the show is Gumball, who faces the trials and tribulations of any twelve-year-old kid - like being chased by a rampaging T-Rex, sleeping rough when a robot steals his identity, or dressing as a cheerleader and doing the splits to impress the girl of his dreams. Simple everyday issues we've all been through. Gumball's hometown of Elmore is every bit as commonplace… a cactus waters his front lawn, a furry slug drives to work, and on the corner a balloon, a potato and a ghost all wait for the school bus. Welcome to The Amazing World of Gumball, where normal just got a little bit weird…

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball
programme.desc: "When Alan ditches Gumball to do something more fun Gumball is desperate to track him down and make him pay for his betrayal. Gumball has through gritted teeth prepared a special dinner for Alan to apologise for the way he has treated him in the past. When Alan cancels he is overjoyed until a post on Elmore Plus reveals Alan lied about his Mom being sick and is having a day of fun with his family instead. Gumball tracks down the traitor to give him a piece of his mind but when he finds out his Mom really is sick he has to find a way to make it up to him.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball‌
programme.desc: In Elmore, reality bends and family life gets weird. Gumball pulls Darwin, Anais, and the whole town into adventures - from fighting evil fast food to dealing with an AI crushing on his mom. The show's so wild, it needed a new name.

programme.title: The Wonderfully Weird World of Gumball‌
programme.desc: In Elmore, reality bends and family life gets weird. Gumball pulls Darwin, Anais, and the whole town into adventures - from fighting evil fast food to dealing with an AI crushing on his mom. The show's so wild, it needed a new name.

programme.title: Clarence
programme.desc: Follow the daily adventures of a 10-year-old boy named Clarence, and his two best friends Sumo and Jeff. Clarence lives with his mother Mary and her boyfriend Chad in the fictional town of Aberdale, and he is optimistic, curious, honest and quirky boy, who sees the best in everyone and gets himself in a variety of funny situations and everyday problems, which he solves with lots of imagination and with the help from his friends.

programme.title: Clarence
programme.desc: Follow the daily adventures of a 10-year-old boy named Clarence, and his two best friends Sumo and Jeff. Clarence lives with his mother Mary and her boyfriend Chad in the fictional town of Aberdale, and he is optimistic, curious, honest and quirky boy, who sees the best in everyone and gets himself in a variety of funny situations and everyday problems, which he solves with lots of imagination and with the help from his friends.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: Adventure Time is an American fantasy animated television series that shows a 12-year-old boy Finn and his best friend, a wise 28-year-old (in dog years) dog Jake with magical powers living in Lands of Ooo in post-apocalyptic world. They lean on each other during good and bad times, trust each another with secrets and look to each other for advice. Finn likes to travel and save princesses from evil monsters in Lands of Ooo. Jake is more than his friend, he is his mentor, and his extraordinary skills help the boy to fight evil. Finn and Jake hang out with Princess Bubblegum, the sovereign of the Candy Kingdom, the fearsome Ice King, an ice wizard, Marceline the Vampire Queen, a 1000-year-old vampire and rock musician and many more.
